standing_gaps.missing: No stated task goal accompanies this trace
standing_gaps.impact: Section 1 is inferred from event activity only; intent-level drift cannot be judged.
standing_gaps.next_step: Provide a one-line statement of what the agent was supposed to do.

standing_gaps.impact: Section 3 cannot convert wasted tokens into USD.
standing_gaps.next_step: Provide the model name and (optionally) your per-token pricing so USD waste can be computed.

missing_token_fields.impact: Section 3 totals are partial; waste estimates on affected findings are marked unknown instead of guessed.
missing_token_fields.next_step: Export token counts per step (most agent SDKs expose usage metadata).

missing_state_hash.impact: Loop/retry detectors cannot confirm unchanged state on those events, so they skip rather than guess; real loops may be under-reported.
missing_state_hash.next_step: Emit a cheap state fingerprint (e.g. hash of working-tree or key outputs) after each action.

missing_model.missing: Model name not provided in trace
missing_model.impact: Section 3 USD estimation is impossible; model-specific advice is generic.
missing_model.next_step: Include the model identifier used by the agent.

empty_findings_note: No waste patterns detected by the current rule set. Absence of findings is not proof of a perfect run — see Section 5 for what this analysis could not see.
goal_confidence_note: Confidence: low-to-medium. This is inferred from event activity only; no stated goal was provided (see Section 5).
usd_note: USD unavailable: no model pricing configured (see Section 5).
no_remediation_note: No remediation needed for this run.
waste_overlap_note: Per-finding waste figures overlap on shared events; the total is clamped to observed tokens and should be read as an upper bound.
